metaTitle: Table Templates — Start From a Structure, Not a Blank Grid | {{BRAND_NAME}}
metaDescription: Ready-made table templates for pricing, schedules, checklists, contact lists, and more. One click generates the structure — you fill in the content.
heroHeadline: Start from a structure, not a blank grid.
heroSubtext: Tablesmit's built-in templates generate the right columns, headers, and row structure for common table types. Skip the setup and get straight to the content.

benefits.heading: Structure in one click
benefits.body: Each template generates the complete column structure for its use case — headers, column types, and initial rows — so you start filling content immediately.

benefits.heading: Fully editable after generation
benefits.body: Templates are starting points. Every column can be renamed, retyped, resized, or removed. Every row can be edited, merged, or extended.

benefits.heading: Export-ready from the start
benefits.body: Templates are designed to export cleanly. The Pricing Table PDF looks like a real pricing document. The Schedule exports to Excel with correct date columns.

benefits.heading: Or start from scratch
benefits.body: Templates are optional. Set your own row and column count in Grid Size and click Create a Table to start with a blank grid.

templates.name: Pricing Table
templates.description: Plan names, features, and pricing tiers. Designed for product and service pricing pages, proposals, and comparisons.

templates.name: Schedule
templates.description: Time, activity, duration, and location columns. For event programmes, class timetables, conference agendas, and meeting schedules.

templates.name: Checklist
templates.description: Task, status, owner, and deadline. For project tracking, process documentation, and structured to-do lists.

templates.name: Contact List
templates.description: Name, organisation, role, email, and phone. For team directories, stakeholder lists, and event registrations.

templates.name: Inventory
templates.description: Item, category, quantity, unit price, and total value. For stock lists, equipment registers, and asset tracking.

steps.heading: Click Templates in the toolbar
steps.body: The Templates dropdown shows all available templates. Each one shows a brief description of its use case.

steps.heading: Select your template
steps.body: Click a template to generate the table instantly. The correct columns, headers, and initial rows appear in the grid.

steps.heading: Fill in your content
steps.body: Click any cell to edit. Tab to move to the next cell. Use the toolbar buttons to add rows or columns as your data grows.

steps.heading: Export when ready
steps.body: Export to PDF, Excel, PNG, or CSV directly from the toolbar — or use keyboard shortcuts Ctrl+P and Ctrl+Shift+X.

useCases: Creating a client pricing proposal using the Pricing Table template
Building a conference programme or event schedule from the Schedule template
Generating a project task tracker from the Checklist template
Producing a stakeholder or team directory using the Contact List template
Documenting equipment or stock levels with the Inventory template

_codex_notes.note: The 'templates' array lists each template with id, name, description, columns, and icon. In FeatureDetailPage, if page.templates exists, render a TemplateCardGrid between benefits and steps. Each card: template name (bold), icon top-left, description, and a small inline preview showing the column headers as chips.
